Handcrafted Custom Knives

Forged by Hand.
Made to Last.

Each blade is an original — shaped from raw steel, finished by hand, and built to perform for a lifetime. Custom orders welcome.

Custom
Orders Welcome
The Craft

Every Knife Begins at the Forge

J.M. Amoedo custom knives are built from the ground up — raw steel shaped through heat and hammer, ground to geometry, fitted with handles chosen for character and durability.

No two blades are alike. Whether you need a chef's workhorse, a field knife, or a collector's piece, each order starts with a conversation about how the knife will be used.

Meet the Maker
The Collection

Browse by Type

Kitchen & Chef's Knives

Culinary blades built for balance and edge retention — chef's knives, santokus, cleavers and more.

View Gallery

Hunting & Field Knives

Fixed-blade field knives designed for hard use — skinning, camp work and outdoor carry.

View Gallery

Collector's Pieces

Art knives and presentation pieces for collectors — exceptional materials, intricate handle work, display-ready.

View Gallery
Recent Work

From the Workshop

View Full Gallery
Why Custom?

A Knife Built Around You

Your dimensions

Handle length, blade geometry and balance tuned to the way you work.

Your materials

Choose your steel, handle material and finish — from practical to heirloom.

Your purpose

Whether it's a kitchen workhorse, a hunting companion or a gift, the design starts there.

Your timeline

Each knife is made to order. Contact me to discuss what you have in mind.

Ready to Start?

Commission Your Custom Knife

Get in touch to discuss your project. Every knife starts with a conversation.

Start a Commission How It Works
